description: The SACRED-structure contract that prove_sp_structure.py loads and enforces against a deck's copy ledger (working/copy/sp_structure.json emitted by the Signature Presentation Architect / Slide Copywriter) plus slides_copy.md. Every rule here is fail-closed: a violation is sys.exit(2) with the named AF code — a violating artifact is NOT run, NOT rendered, NOT updated. Derived verbatim from MASTERDOC Prime Directives; never floored or reinterpreted.

phases.name: Avatar Section
phases.purpose: Mastering the Audience Avatar — first you tell THEIR story, then you tell yours.

phases.name: Signature Story
phases.purpose: Crafting Your Personal Story — tell your story so the audience sees themselves in it; end on a gripping why.

phases.name: Transformational Teaching
phases.purpose: Teach your methodology in 3-7 steps; the final step bridges to the offer. NO PITCHING in this phase.
phases.bridge_slide: final teaching step; may promise what comes next; may NOT name a price or product

phases.name: Purpose Pitch
phases.purpose: The Purpose Pitch (not profit pitch) — offer, proof, honest scarcity, guarantee, conviction close.

phase_ordering.reading: Per-phase floors (11 / 13 / 36 / 40), contiguous, in order. When a phase expands past its default band to reach the >=100 floor (Directive 11), later phases shift by the same amount but stay contiguous and in order.

client_exact_override.rule: The >=100 floor is the DEFAULT. If the client states an EXACT slide count, the client's number wins (fleet-wide client-exact law): AF-SP-SLIDE-FLOOR is skipped ONLY when client_overrode_slide_floor is true, the exact count is honored, the override is logged, and it is surfaced on the process certificate. Phase min_slides floors still apply proportionally in order.

case_studies.rule: <=2 CASE_STUDY-tagged slides (Prime Directive 12); floor of 1 from the department proof battery. A missing tags section is itself a FAIL so the cap cannot be dodged by not tagging.

suggested_image.rule: Every slide must carry a non-empty suggested_image (Prime Directive 4) — the authoring seed the Prompt Author expands to the 9,000-18,000-char rich prompt. The seed never replaces the prompt floor.

hooks.rule: One central hook repeated like a chorus (its 3-4 dedicated pure-typography slides) + four section hooks (one per phase) that ladder up to it. Section hooks must be DISTINCT lines from the central hook (so they never trip the verbatim-hook-elsewhere battery).

neeit_quadrant.rule: N.E.E.I.T. + the 4-Quadrant method (4 quadrants @ 25%) structure Phases 1, 2, and 4. Markers must be present in those phase sections.

movement_message_methodology.rule: Movement + Message + Methodology = Manifestation — all three must be present (deterministic marker check here; semantic check in the qc-specialist-signature battery).

frames.note: Frame governs teaching devices / refrains / close only; the 4-phase skeleton and every rule above are identical across frames.

slide_ledger_schema.note: Shape of each entry in the deck's copy ledger the prover reads. A missing required field is a FAIL.

fields.label_slide: boolean, true on the slide that carries the phase name + purpose (Directive 10)
fields.tags: array; may include CASE_STUDY, and phase/step markers; a missing tags key is a FAIL

autofail_codes.AF-SP-SLIDE-FLOOR: total slides < 100 with no logged client-exact override
autofail_codes.AF-SP-PHASE-RANGE: a phase below its min_slides floor
autofail_codes.AF-SP-PHASE-ORDER: phases not contiguous-from-1 or out of order
autofail_codes.AF-SP-PHASE-LABEL: a phase missing its label slide carrying name + purpose (Directive 10)
autofail_codes.AF-SP-IMG-SUGGESTION: any slide with an empty suggested_image (Directive 4)
autofail_codes.AF-SP-CASESTUDY-CAP: more than 2 CASE_STUDY-tagged slides, or a missing tags section (Directive 12)
autofail_codes.AF-SP-HOOK: hook_package.json missing central_hook or 4 distinct section_hooks
